name: HMS Tarantella (T 142)
events: 14 May 1941 HMS H 43 (Lt. H.S. Mackenzie, RN) shifted from Rosyth to Methill.
She departed for Tobermory later the same day escorted by HMS Tarantella (T/Lt. the Hon. R.A. Balfour, RNVR). (1)
23 May 1941 HMS H 28 (Lt. D.S.R. Martin, RN) departed Tobermory for Rothesay. She was escorted by HMS Tarantella (T/Lt. the Hon. R.A. Balfour, RNVR). (2)
25 May 1941 HMS L 26 (Lt. M.B. St. John, RN) shifted from Rothesay to Tobermory. She was escorted by HMS Tarantella (T/Lt. the Hon. R.A. Balfour, RNVR). (3)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
